title: IMD nowcast snapshot
description: Contract for data/realtime/imd_nowcast/latest.json — per-district next-3-hour nowcast from the IMD district nowcast API. Records are empty until IMD_API_KEY + IMD_API_TOKEN are configured; the contract still validates the empty snapshot.

generated_at_iso.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp (Z-suffixed) when the snapshot was written. Stamped by scrapers/lib/storage.py:write_latest_snapshot().

district_id.description: IMD internal district ID (NOT Census code), shared with imd_warnings DEFAULT_DISTRICTS.

district_name.description: Human-readable district name with state abbreviation, e.g. 'Indore (MP)'.

observation_time.description: Nowcast issue/observation time as returned by the API (format varies); may be empty.

category.description: IMD nowcast weather category. 1-19 spans clear sky through extreme thunderstorms; 0 is the parser's default when the API omits the field.

color.description: Nowcast severity colour (lowercased): green = no warning, yellow = watch, orange = alert, red = warning.

severity.description: Human-readable severity derived from color via imd_warnings.SEVERITY_BY_COLOR. 'Unknown' when the API returns a colour outside the standard legend.

message.description: Consolidated nowcast message from the IMD API; may be empty.
